context: Evaluates LocalPgVectorBackend retrieve() against the affordabot retrieval contract. Checks that the embedding_fn is called for queries, that top_k limits results, that jurisdiction metadata filters are applied, and that fail_closed raises errors on missing embedder.

checklist.name: Embedding function called
checklist.description: retrieve() calls the injected embedding_fn with the query string to produce a vector before querying the database.

checklist.name: Returns RetrievedChunk list
checklist.description: retrieve() returns a List[RetrievedChunk] with populated content and metadata fields.

checklist.name: top_k limit respected
checklist.description: The number of returned chunks does not exceed the top_k argument passed to retrieve().

checklist.name: Jurisdiction filter applied
checklist.description: When filters={'jurisdiction': 'california'} is passed, only chunks with matching jurisdiction metadata are returned.

checklist.name: fail_closed raises on missing embedder
checklist.description: When embedding_fn is None and fail_closed=True, calling retrieve() raises an exception rather than silently returning empty results.
